title: Soccer Emoji ⚽ Copy & Paste List
meta_description: Copy and paste every soccer emoji — ⚽ ball, 🥅 goal, 🧤 gloves, 🏆 trophy, plus cards and celebration emojis. Click any emoji to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The complete soccer (association football) emoji set — ball, goal, players, trophies, and cards. Click any emoji to copy it instantly.
intro: Soccer emojis turn a plain caption or bio into a matchday post. Whether you are hyping your team before kickoff, reacting to a goal, or building a World Cup bio, this page gathers every soccer-related emoji in one place — the ball, the goal, the gloves, the trophy, and the yellow and red cards. Click any emoji below to copy it, then paste it anywhere.
